title: Risk Management

assumptions.text: CAPEX contingency percentage (typically 10-15%) to be confirmed by CFO team and included in financial model.

open_issues.text: Risk register should be cross-referenced with the risk analysis in the Feasibility Study annex and Business Plan annex for consistency.

evaluation_criterion: 3.4 — Risk management (contributes to overall Project Maturity score, Section 3)

scoring_targets.risk_identification: 10 risks across technical, supply chain, regulatory, financial, market, operational categories
scoring_targets.risk_assessment: Probability-impact matrix with residual risk after mitigation
scoring_targets.risk_mitigation: Specific, actionable mitigation strategies for each risk
scoring_targets.dt_as_risk_mitigation: DT explicitly positioned as reducing technical and operational risks
